violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Cloths used for cleaning food contact surfaces were left out of any sanitizing solution after being used.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Countertop surface next to the hand sink has deteriorated and is no longer a non-absorbent cleanable surface.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Bathroom doors were not fitted with a self closing device.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the walk-in cooler and in the kitchen need to be cleaned more thoroughly.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in the dry storage is missing tiles or has damaged and stained tiles.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Full unlabeled chemical spray bottles next to the hand sink in the kitchen.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Quat based sanitizer in a spray bottle was reading at >500, according to the directions it needs to read between 150-400ppm.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
